description: Style NoteA basic T-shirt to pep up your casual wardrobe, this tee from femella has a unique style quotient that truly represents the woman of today. The vibrant colour and the soft cotton fabric keeps you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes.Product DetailsFuschia pink top, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and embroidered branding above the left hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash cold using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not bleach or wringDry inside outUse warm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8", chest 33") is wearing a size M
